Reliable and Durable USB Lightning Cable: Reinforced apple iPhone charger cable with special SR joint design that have passed 10000+ times bending tests for extra protection and durability. The solid and durable two-shade braided armor nylon shield gives the iPhone wire stronger protection and flexible performance than other iPhone charging cable, and no need to worry about tangling, effectively prolong the service life.

MFi Certification iPhone Cable Fast Charging: The USB to Lightning cable is MFi certified, there is no frequent pop-ups when connecting. This apple charger cable supports fast charging (up to 2.4A) and transmits data with up to 480 Mbit, preventing overheating and overcharging, the iPhone fast charger cable ensure that your device charges safely.

Nylon Braided USB iPhone Charger Cable 1M: The iPhone lightning charger cables designed and built with only premium materials and original 8 Pin connector with a lightning end, ensure that your iPhone devices are syncing and charging safely at maximum speed.Laser-welded connectors ensure superior functionality under heavy usage.iPhone cable 1m, lets you easily reach a USB port on the front/back of computers/wall adapters, and take with while travelling around easily.
Warranty Policy: You will get 2Pack 1M iPhone charger lead with 3 years warranty and friendly 24/7 customer service. Please contact us if there's any questions with our iPhone USB cable.
description: Product Description High Quality Nylon Braided iPhone Lightning Charger Cables The integrated smart chip of the iPhone charger cable ensures a more stable data transfer speed, ensures safe fast charging and effectively prevents overcharging, overheating and overcurrent. The nylon braided sheath and aluminum shell make the iPhone charging cables sturdy and durable, so that the service life is twice that of the standard iPhone USB cable. The sturdy plug can avoid poor contact, thus ensuring stability during data transmission. 2Pack 1M MFi Certified USB to Lightning Cable This iPad charger cable delivers lightning-fast data transfer, effortless syncing and fast charging (supports a maximum 2.4 A charging current). Heat-resistant connectors ensure complete safety and reliability.Strong compatibility to work with Most iOS devices. MFi Certified Apple Charging Cable iPhone cable fast charging certified by MFI and 8 Pin connector with a fast Charging end, ensured safe charging for your devices. Enjoy fast charge and data transfer. iPhone Cable 1M High-quality four-core copper wire improves charging and data transmission speed. Super high-quality apple phone charger cable, wide cable diameter, reducing cable resistance, maximizing charging speed and reducing charging time. Nylon Braid iPhone Charger Lead This USB lightning cable made of high-quality, braided nylon material and a service life of more than10000 plugging and unplugging. iPhone Wire Cable Compatibility: For iPhone 14/ 14 Plus/ 14 Pro Max/ 14 Pro/ 13/ iPhone 13 Pro/ iPhone 13 Pro Max/ 13 Mini/ iPhone 12/ iPhone 12 Pro/ iPhone 12 Pro Max/ 12 Mini/ iPhone 11 / iPhone 11 Pro / iPhone 11 Pro Max / iPhone X / iPhone XS / iPhone XS Max / iPhone XR / iPhone SE 2020/ iPhone 8 / iPhone 8 Plus / iPhone 7 / iPhone 7 Plus / iPhone 6 / iPhone 6s /iPhone 6Plus / iPhone 6s Plus/ iPhone SE 2016 / iPhone 5 / iPhone 5S / iPhone5C ; iPad 5/6/7/8/9 ; iPad Air 2/3 ; iPad mini 2/3/4/5 ; iPad Pro 12.9 (2015); iPad Pro 12.9 2nd (2017). Notes: Every USB iPhone charger cable has its service life, in order to make it last longer, please do not touching with in liquid and avoid charging when it was wet. The iPhone cable plug inserted into the Lightning devices horizontally avoid the connector damage caused by violent plugging and unplugging. Clean the dust and foreign objects in the iPhone or tablet regularly , avoid too poor to contact.
